= escape_url_query


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.escaped = this.value.escape_url_query()

# In:  {"value":"foo & bar"}
# Out: {"escaped":"foo+%26+bar"}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.url = "https://example.com?search=" + this.query.escape_url_query()

# In:  {"query":"hello world!"}
# Out: {"url":"https://example.com?search=hello+world%21"}
----
